need: Need a centralized platform to easily discover campus events, workshops, club activities, and important university announcements without searching multiple sources.
value_expected: Easy access to all campus events, online registration, timely reminders, and personalized event recommendations.

need: Need an efficient way to publish, update, and promote campus events while managing participant registrations.
value_expected: Simple event creation, participant management, wider event visibility, and better student engagement.

need: Need to monitor event submissions, approve published events, manage platform content, and ensure information is accurate and up to date.
value_expected: Well-organized event management system, reliable information, secure moderation tools, and event analytics.
